testcase.name: Company API E2E › GET /api/companies - empty state returns empty array
Company API E2E › POST /api/companies - create new company
Company API E2E › POST /api/companies - create second company
Company API E2E › GET /api/companies - returns both companies
Company API E2E › PATCH /api/companies/{id}/activate - activates company
Company API E2E › PATCH /api/companies/{id}/activate - only one company can be active (partial unique index)
Company API E2E › POST /api/companies - blank name returns 400
Company API E2E › DELETE /api/companies/{id} - removes company
Company API E2E › GET /api/companies - deleted company no longer in list
Company API E2E › PATCH /api/companies/{id}/activate - deleted company returns 404
Convention API E2E › GET /api/conventions - returns list
Convention API E2E › POST /api/conventions - create convention
Convention API E2E › GET /api/conventions/{id} - retrieve created convention
Convention API E2E › PUT /api/conventions/{id} - update convention
Convention API E2E › POST /api/conventions - validation: blank term returns 400
Convention API E2E › POST /api/conventions - validation: blank definition returns 400
Convention API E2E › DELETE /api/conventions/{id} - delete convention
Convention API E2E › GET /api/conventions/{id} - deleted convention returns 404
TestCase API E2E › GET /api/test-cases?productId={id} - empty list
TestCase API E2E › POST /api/test-cases - create test case with path
TestCase API E2E › POST /api/test-cases - create second test case
TestCase API E2E › GET /api/test-cases?productId={id} - returns both
TestCase API E2E › PUT /api/test-cases/{id} - updates test case
TestCase API E2E › POST /api/test-cases - missing title returns 400
TestCase API E2E › DELETE /api/test-cases/{id} - removes test case
TestCase API E2E › GET /api/test-cases?productId={id} - one remains
TestCase API E2E › DELETE /api/products/{id} - cascades delete to test cases
Knowledge Base API E2E › GET /api/kb - returns list
Knowledge Base API E2E › POST /api/kb - create manual KB entry
Knowledge Base API E2E › GET /api/kb/{id} - retrieve created entry
Knowledge Base API E2E › PUT /api/kb/{id} - update entry
Knowledge Base API E2E › POST /api/kb - validation: blank title returns 400
Knowledge Base API E2E › GET /api/kb/jobs - returns job list
Knowledge Base API E2E › DELETE /api/kb/{id} - delete entry
Knowledge Base API E2E › GET /api/kb/{id} - deleted entry returns 404
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - empty product list
Product API E2E › POST /api/products - create WEB product
Product API E2E › POST /api/products - create MOBILE product
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - returns both products
Product API E2E › PUT /api/products/{id} - updates product
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - reflects updated product
Product API E2E › POST /api/products - missing name returns 400
Product API E2E › DELETE /api/products/{id} - removes product
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - only one product remains
Product API E2E › DELETE /api/companies/{id} - cascades delete to products
Segment API E2E › GET /api/segments?productId={id} - empty segment list
Segment API E2E › POST /api/segments - create root segment
Segment API E2E › POST /api/segments - create child segment
Segment API E2E › GET /api/segments?productId={id} - returns both segments
Segment API E2E › PUT /api/segments/{id} - update segment name
Segment API E2E › POST + PATCH /api/segments - reparent segment
Segment API E2E › DELETE /api/segments/{id} - delete root cascades children
Senior FAQ API E2E › GET /api/senior/faq - returns list
Senior FAQ API E2E › POST /api/senior/faq - create FAQ
Senior FAQ API E2E › GET /api/senior/faq/{id} - retrieve created FAQ
Senior FAQ API E2E › PUT /api/senior/faq/{id} - update FAQ
Senior FAQ API E2E › POST /api/senior/faq - validation: blank title returns 400
Senior FAQ API E2E › POST /api/senior/faq - validation: blank content returns 400
Senior FAQ API E2E › DELETE /api/senior/faq/{id} - delete FAQ
Senior FAQ API E2E › GET /api/senior/faq/{id} - deleted FAQ returns 404
Company List Page › should display Companies heading on page load
Company List Page › should add a company via modal
Company List Page › should activate company and show Active badge
Company List Page › should delete company via confirm dialog
Company List Page › should navigate to products on company click
Company List Page › should show search bar and sort dropdown
Company List Page › should show Add New card
Test Case Page › should display empty tree state with Root Path button
Test Case Page › should display test cases created via API
Test Case Page › should show segments in tree view
Test Case Page › should delete a test case via confirm dialog
Test Case Page › should show path on test case card
Test Case Page › should select segment and add test case via modal
Product List Page › should show search bar, sort dropdown, and Add New card
Product List Page › should add a WEB product via modal
Product List Page › should display products created via API
Product List Page › should delete product via confirm dialog
Product List Page › should navigate to test cases on product click
Product List Page › should show empty state when no products exist
Senior Page › should display My Senior heading on page load
Senior Page › should show FAQ view as default entry

failure.message: senior.spec.ts:15:7 should show FAQ view as default entry

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/senior.spec.ts:15:7 › Senior Page › should show FAQ view as default entry ────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('input[placeholder*="FAQ"]') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('input[placeholder*="FAQ"]')
20 | await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /Chat/ })).toBeVisible(); 21 | // Search bar should be visible > 22 | await expect(page.locator('input[placeholder*="FAQ"]')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 23 | }); 24 | 25 | // --- View navigation --- at /Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/ui/senior.spec.ts:22:61

testcase.name: Senior Page › should switch to Chat view when Chat button clicked
Senior Page › should switch to KB Management view when KB button clicked

failure.message: senior.spec.ts:36:7 should switch to KB Management view when KB button clicked

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/senior.spec.ts:36:7 › Senior Page › should switch to KB Management view when KB button clicked
TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: 'KB' })

testcase.name: Senior Page › should navigate between all views

failure.message: senior.spec.ts:43:7 should navigate between all views

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/senior.spec.ts:43:7 › Senior Page › should navigate between all views ────────────
